arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. Sunderland - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Swansea City and Sunderland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Goals from Jay Fulton and Liam Cullen gave Swansea a commanding advantage against a struggling Plymouth side on Tuesday night as Luke Williams' men sealed a critical away win at Home Park. The Welsh...
